meaning: n.熟悉,通晓,亲密,熟悉,精通
examples: Tony was unnerved by the uncanny familiarity of her face.
When she saw the house, she had a feeling of familiarity.
The enemy would always have the advantage of familiarity with the rugged terrain.
Familiarity breeds comfort, so employees load up on even more risk elsewhere in the portfolio.
First, it has the advantage of familiarity, since it dates back to the late 1940s.
